consent.title: AI Features
consent.description: Life To Do uses AI to help you capture, clarify, and review your tasks. When you use AI features, your task text is sent to {providerName} for processing.
consent.privacy: Your data is not stored or used for training. Task details, projects, and inbox contents are processed and discarded. You can turn AI off anytime in Settings.

coach.greeting: Hi, I'm your AI GTD Coach. How can I help clarify your thoughts today?

errors.offline: AI features require internet. Your GTD tools work fine offline.
errors.rateLimited: You've been busy! AI features will be back shortly.
errors.timeout: Taking too long — you can fill this in manually.
errors.authError: AI configuration issue. Please check settings.
errors.providerError: AI is having a moment — try again in a few seconds.
errors.parseError: AI response was unclear — try rephrasing.

coach.error: The Coach needs a moment to rest. Try again.

brainDump.title: Brain Dump
brainDump.placeholder: Paste everything on your mind here — we'll sort it out
brainDump.result: {count, plural, one {# task extracted} other {# tasks extracted}}
brainDump.nothingFound: No tasks found. Try writing in more detail?
